mapper.select: SELECT file_id AS fileId, original_name AS originalName, saved_name AS savedName, content_type AS contentType, size_bytes AS sizeBytes, storage_path AS storagePath, created_at AS createdAt FROM files WHERE file_id = #{fileId} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO files(original_name, saved_name, content_type, size_bytes, storage_path, tenant_id) VALUES(#{originalName}, #{savedName}, #{contentType}, #{sizeBytes}, #{storagePath}, #{tenantId})
